title: EnergyResourceCommon
description: Canonical base schemas shared by all typed EnergyResource kinds. v1.1: power fields use QuantitativeValue {value, unit} — ratedPower, maxExport, maxImport replace ratedPowerKw, maxExportKw, maxImportKw. Contains EnergyResourceCommonAttributes (attribute bag base) and EnergyResourceCommon (structural envelope).

QuantitativeValue.description: A dimensioned quantity with a numeric value and a QUDT unit code.

unit.description: QUDT unit code, e.g. KiloW, KiloW-HR, KiloV-A, KiloV-A_Reactive, KiloV.

EnergyResourceCommonAttributes.description: Dimensioning and provenance fields shared by all resource kinds. Inherited inside each kind's attributes bag via allOf. No field is required at this level.

ratedPower.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power. Typical unit: KiloW. Kept for backward compatibility — prefer maxExport for new payloads. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP / EndDeviceInfo.ratedPower.

maxExport.description: Maximum power injected to the grid (generates/discharges). Typical unit: KiloW. Always ≥0. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP / PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (injection).

maxImport.description: Maximum power drawn from the grid (absorbs/charges). Typical unit: KiloW. Always ≥0. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (absorption).

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time the asset was commissioned.

EnergyResourceCommon.description: Structural envelope inherited by every typed EnergyResource kind via allOf. Defines id, type, topology (subResources, parentResources), and the attributes bag.

id.description: Stable identifier for this resource. For METER resources the meter serial number is conventional.

type.description: Asset class discriminator. Constrained to a kind-specific enum or const in each typed kind schema.

subResources.description: Topology — child resources. Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: Upward topology — ids of parent resources.

attributes.description: Attribute bag. Inherits EnergyResourceCommonAttributes via allOf plus kind-specific fields.
